mentions.note: Truck giant finally breaking out of freight recession; good number emboldens continued buying of trucking sector despite hard business.

Fine quarter with 24% EPS growth from cost cuts and buybacks, but freight market remains 'fragile'—stock at 27x forward earnings now expensive; wait for freight recovery visibility before accumulating.
Great company in hot trucking sector after three down years; expects stock headed higher; reports Thursday after close.
